workers.movement_summary: Active, operating manual wheelbarrow to transport gravel for concrete mixing.
Stationary, performing concrete mixing duties near the machinery.
Stationary, positioned on the machinery platform adding materials to the mixer.

overall_summary: The site is unsafe due to multiple workers operating heavy machinery and moving heavy materials without the use of mandatory safety helmets or high-visibility vests. Additionally, work is being performed in an exposed environment without appropriate personal protective equipment.
